summary: Iteration 21 — PUTKI HQ Most-Read Rail (backend endpoint + frontend rotating rail). Backend: 10/10 pytest passed for GET /api/content/most-read. Frontend: rail renders, rotates every ~6s, pager works, link navigates to /uutiset/{slug}, FI/EN translations correct with pluralisation.

minor.issue: limit=0 is treated as default (5) due to `int(limit or 5)` falsy-check, not clamped to 1 as the documented '1<=limit<=20' contract implies. hours=0 correctly clamps to 1 (`int(hours or 1)`). Inconsistent edge-case handling — works because FastAPI defaults supply 5/1 when omitted, but explicit '?limit=0' yields 5 instead of 1. Low priority.

action_items: Optional: align limit=0 / hours=0 edge behavior — either clamp both to 1 (max(1, min(int(limit or 0), 20))) or document that '0 = use default'.
Consider: most_read() helper currently counts dedup entries — each unique fingerprint counts once per article, which is correct for hourly trending. Good design.
critical_code_review_comments: article_views.py:109 — `int(limit or 5)` masks an explicit `0` and replaces with 5. Use `max(1, min(int(limit), 20))` after a separate `if limit is None` default. Same for hours.

MostReadRail.jsx:37 — REFRESH_MS = 60000 will refetch every minute; combined with 6s rotation this means after a refetch the `active` index may exceed new `items.length`. Safe-guarded by `items[active] || items[0]` fallback (good). Minor: consider resetting active=0 on refetch if items list changed.

MostReadRail.jsx:64 — Only the currently active item is rendered as a `<Link>` (data-testid=`most-read-link-${active}`). Tests requiring data-testid='most-read-link-2' must first click the pager dot to make idx=2 active. Verified to work in tests.

article_views.py:144 — `since` is built as ISO string but `ts` is stored as ISO string — string comparison works only because of zulu/offset format consistency. Acceptable but fragile if ts format ever drifts.
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing seeded view counts (98 articles, dedup table populated per agent context).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoint /api/content/most-read tested with hours={1,24,999,0}, limit={1,3,5,50,0}. Top item by views_window=133 is the 'renttuofficial' streamer alert. Frontend rail data-testid='most-read-rail' is placed in Home.jsx after dial section and before SocialProofBar. Pager dots are span elements inside data-testid='most-read-pager' (desktop only, hidden on mobile via `hidden sm:flex`). Rotation interval is 6s, refresh interval is 60s. FI labels: 'Luetuin nyt', 'lukukertaa'/'lukukerta'. EN labels: 'Hot right now', 'reads'/'read'. App default language is EN — to test FI, click FI in the EN/FI lang toggle.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found — feature works end-to-end.
